overall.description: A stationary nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city street from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower above wet asphalt reflecting colorful advertisements, while futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane road. The scene features elevated transit infrastructure and maintains a consistent cinematic atmosphere throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown street with elevated transit infrastructure and neon advertising

events.description: white sedan parked on the right shoulder pulls out and accelerates into traffic
yellow taxi cab drives past in the right lane heading away from camera
yellow sports car drives past in the right lane

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on the sidewalk observing the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan initially parked, then pulls away and drives down the street
yellow taxi driving past the camera position in the right lane

entered.detail: tall building facade covered with large illuminated digital billboards and vertical neon signage
metal infrastructure spanning across the street overhead with support beams
row of palm trees lining the left side of the street
tall glass and steel buildings towering in the background with illuminated windows
tall street lamps with green illuminated bases lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: A stationary nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk downtown street. The camera stands on the sidewalk facing a multi-lane road with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights from the massive advertisement-covered building on the right. An elevated transit track spans overhead. Various futuristic vehicles including a white sedan and yellow taxi drive past on the road. Palm trees line the left side of the street, and towering skyscrapers fill the background. The scene is illuminated by artificial neon lighting with no pedestrians visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, atmospheric view of a futuristic cyberpunk downtown street bathed in artificial neon light. It begins on a sidewalk overlooking a multi-lane road, where wet asphalt mirrors the vibrant glow of massive advertisement-covered buildings. As the camera holds its position, futuristic vehicles including a white sedan and a yellow taxi glide past beneath an elevated transit track that spans the overhead space. The scene then expands to reveal palm trees lining the left side of the street, contrasting with the towering skyscrapers that dominate the background. Finally, the view settles into a cinematic stillness, emphasizing the empty, neon-drenched urban landscape devoid of pedestrians.
